notes: Focused benchmark manifest for the core glycolysis-energy Km campaign. Prioritizes identifiability of core glycolysis and adenylate behavior while keeping ATP guarding explicit but secondary.

cases.name: core_mid_horizon
cases.description: Primary identifiability case for the focused Km campaign.

cases.name: core_short_low_forcing
cases.description: Checks whether early-shape improvement appears without relying on stronger forcing.

cases.name: core_mid_horizon_soft_atp_guard
cases.description: Secondary diagnostic with a softer ATP guard to ensure the focused Km fit does not immediately collapse adenylates.

cases.name: core_alt_seed
cases.description: Basic stochastic robustness check for the focused core objective.
